parameters.query:
SELECT 
    AT.YNUM_0 as id_accident,
    AT.YMAT_0 as matricule_salarie,
    AT.YCODSAL_0 as code_salarie,
    AT.YDATAT_0 as date_accident,
    AT.YHEURAT_0 as heure_accident,
    AT.YLIEUAT_0 as lieu_accident,
    AT.YDESAT_0 as description_courte,
    AT.YNATBLES_0 as type_accident,
    SD.LANMES_0 as gravite,
    AT.CREDATTIM_0 as date_creation,
    AT.UPDDATTIM_0 as date_derniere_maj,
    
    P.VALEUR_0 as delai_total_jours,
    CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,
    DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0) as date_limite_depot,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, AT.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) AS jours_restants,

    -- Infos victime
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_victime,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_victime,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_victime,

    -- Infirmier
    S1.code_salarie_infirmier, S1.nom_infirmier, S1.prenom_infirmier,
    S1.email_infirmier, S1.telephone_mobile_infirmier,
    S1.chat_id_infirmier, S1.langue_infirmier, S1.bot_infirmier,
    S1.titre_infirmier, S1.service_infirmier,

    -- Supérieur
    S1.code_superieur, S1.nom_superieur, S1.prenom_superieur,
    S1.email_superieur, S1.telephone_mobile_superieur,
    S1.chat_id_superieur, S1.langue_superieur, S1.bot_superieur,

    -- PDG
    'PDG'                 as code_pdg,
    'Direction Générale'  as nom_pdg,
    'Jbel Annour'         as prenom_pdg,
    'PDG@jbel-annour.com' as email_pdg,
    NULL                  as telephone_pdg,
    '8528101210'          as chat_id_pdg,
    'ARA'                 as langue_pdg,
    '@Jbel_Annour_IAbot'  as bot_pdg,

    -- DGA (S0949)
    dga.XSAL_0    AS code_dga,
    dga.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_dga,
    dga.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_dga,
    dga.XEMAIL_0  AS email_dga,
    dga.YTELE_0   AS telephone_dga,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_dga,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS langue_dga,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS bot_dga,

    -- Farhat
    farhat.XSAL_0    AS code_farhat,
    farhat.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_farhat,
    farhat.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_farhat,
    farhat.XEMAIL_0  AS email_farhat,
    farhat.YTELE_0   AS telephone_farhat,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_farhat,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS langue_farhat,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS bot_farhat,

    -- Baallah (S0179 - NOUVEAU)
    baallah.XSAL_0    AS code_baallah,
    baallah.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_baallah,
    baallah.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_baallah,
    baallah.XEMAIL_0  AS email_baallah,
    baallah.YTELE_0   AS telephone_baallah,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah

FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAT AT 
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.APLSTD SD ON AT.YGRAVAT_0 = SD.LANNUM_0  
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YPJAT'
    ) P
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
    ) dga
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'
    ) farhat
    -- ─── BAALLAH (NOUVEAU) ───
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
    ) baallah
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT  
            s.XSAL_0 AS code_salarie_infirmier,
            s.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_infirmier,
            s.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_infirmier,
            s.YTELE_0 AS telephone_mobile_infirmier,
            s.XEMAIL_0 AS email_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS langue_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS bot_infirmier,
            z.YTIT_0 AS titre_infirmier,
            ZS.YTIT_0 AS service_infirmier,
            s.YSUP_0 AS code_superieur,
            ss.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_superieur, ss.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_superieur,
            ss.XEMAIL_0 AS email_superieur, ss.YTELE_0 AS telephone_mobile_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE z ON s.ZPOSTE_0 = z.YNUM_0
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL ss ON ss.XSAL_0 = s.YSUP_0
            OUTER APPLY (SELECT y.YSRV_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE y WHERE y.YNUM_0 = s.ZPOSTE_0) po
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZSERVICES ZS ON po.YSRV_0 = ZS.YNUM_0
        WHERE s.XFLG_0 = 2 AND po.YSRV_0 = 'SRV010'
        GROUP BY s.XSAL_0, s.XNAMSAL_0, s.XPRENOM_0, z.YTIT_0, s.YSUP_0,
                 ss.XPRENOM_0, ss.XNAMSAL_0, s.XEMAIL_0, ss.XEMAIL_0,
                 s.YTELE_0, ss.YTELE_0, ZS.YTIT_0
    ) S1

WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT * FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT AOBJTXT 
        WHERE AT.YNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'YAT'
    )
    AND DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0) >= GETDATE()
    AND SD.LANCHP_0 = 6201 
    AND SD.LAN_0 = 'FRA'
    -- ✅ Couvre tous les niveaux jusqu'au seuil DGA/BAALLAH (délai/2)
    AND DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) 
        <= (CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2)

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC;

nodes.name: SQL - Accidents AT avec Escalade2
nodes.notes: Extraction complète avec calcul automatique du niveau d'escalade (PDG/SUPERIEUR/INFIRMIER/FARHAT/BAALLAH)

nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes2
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune donnée

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire2
nodes.notes: Groupe les accidents par destinataire avec escalade automatique (PDG/DGA/SUPERIEUR/INFIRMIER/FARHAT/BAALLAH)

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues2
nodes.notes: Génère les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire (PDG/DGA/SUPERIEUR/INFIRMIER/FARHAT/BAALLAH)

nodes.name: Envoi Email2
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade
